ANYONE PROTOCOL
An incentivized onion router. Live.
7,000+ active relays worldwide. One privacy network you can watch live.
🧭
Explore the Network
Tap any zone, click MODE for daylight, or open the Relay Browser — here’s how to make sense of what you’re looking at.
🏥
Network Health
Live 0–100 score for the network: geographic spread, ISP diversity, bandwidth, and relay uptime history.
⬡
Map Nodes
Each shape is a relay zone. Size = relay count. Color = type: orange Exit, purple Guard, teal Middle, gold Hardware.
📡
Signals
Live traffic arcs show real-time connections being routed through the network right now.
🌐
Domains
Anyone-registered .anyone domains mapped to relay operators — your decentralized namespace.
🔍
Relay Browser
Search and filter all 7,000+ relays by country, ISP, bandwidth, uptime, and relay type.
⬡
Drop files here
Images (PNG, JPG, GIF, WebP) or Documents (PDF, DOC, TXT)
